title: Best Hotels in Chanthaburi Thailand (2026)
meta_description: The best hotels in Chanthaburi for 2026, from heritage river stays and practical city bases to Chao Lao beach resorts that only make sense if the coast matters.
intro: Chanthaburi hotel choice is mostly about deciding what kind of trip you are actually taking. Stay in or near the city if you care most about the old waterfront, gem market, food, and easy day trips. Stay on the coast only if Chao Lao Beach is genuinely part of the plan. These hotels make that geography easier rather than harder.

items.name: Maneechan Resort
items.description: One of the strongest all-round Chanthaburi bases if you want comfortable rooms, on-site dining, and easy access in multiple directions.
items.current_info: Best for travelers who want one hotel to support both city time and regional day trips.

items.name: Rimnaam Klangchan Hotel
items.description: A practical riverside hotel if you want city comfort and a location that still feels connected to the urban core.
items.current_info: A strong pick if you want a straightforward hotel without giving up the river-city feel.

items.name: Baan Luang Rajamaitri Historic Inn
items.description: The most characterful heritage stay in Chanthaburi if atmosphere and historical setting matter more than resort facilities.
items.current_info: Best for travelers treating the river quarter as the center of the trip.

items.name: Blue Rabbit Hotel
items.description: A modern, convenience-first option for travelers who care more about straightforward comfort and parking than about heritage styling.
items.current_info: A better fit for drivers and shorter no-drama overnights.

items.name: Tamajun Hotel
items.description: A smaller river-area stay that works best for travelers who want the old town to stay central from morning through evening.
items.current_info: Best for a more atmosphere-led city stay rather than a province-wide driving base.

items.name: Chaolao Cabana Resort
items.description: A sensible beach-resort choice only if Chao Lao Beach and the coast are actual priorities rather than token add-ons.
highlights: Useful when the beach really matters
items.current_info: Keep this for coast-led itineraries; otherwise a city base is usually more coherent.
